params.name: The Knotted Pistol
params.description:
On Nov 19, 1988 AD, Luxembourg gifted the Knotted Pistol to the UN.
The Knotted Pistol, aka Non-Violence, is a bronze sculpture located in the garden at the United Nations headquarters. It is a .45 revolver with a knotted barrel, conveying the sculptor's resentment for war and violence. After John Lennon was shot, his wife had his friend, a Swedish artist named Reutersward make the sculpture to express his wish for peace. Luxembourg later bought it and gifted it to the UN.
